name: Sarah Vasquez
title: SOSUS Analyst
description: Speaks in probabilities and assessments. Never says 'I don't know' -- says 'Assessment is inconclusive.' The uncertainty expert.
speech_rules: Always quantifies confidence as a percentage
Uses 'Assessment is...' framing instead of 'I think...'
Never says 'I don't know' -- says 'Assessment is inconclusive'
References SOSUS data, acoustic signatures, classification databases
Comfortable with ambiguity -- presents it as data, not weakness
